title: Projects
subtitle: Portfolio of my work and projects

projects.title: NIRF Ranking Database System
projects.description: Designed a complete SQL Server database based on India's NIRF ranking parameters. Created multiple relational tables (universities, faculty, students, research, etc.) and populated them with large-scale realistic data while maintaining foreign key integrity.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive database system that models India's National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) parameters. The system includes tables for universities, faculty members, students, research publications, infrastructure, and rankings. Implemented complex relationships and constraints to ensure data integrity.
features: Multiple relational tables with foreign keys

projects.title: Document Semantic Mapping System
projects.description: Built a Python-based system that semantically maps data from dynamic input Word documents to structured output formats using OpenAI APIs while preserving layout, headings, and document structure. Exported final results to Word and PDF.
projects.longDescription: An intelligent document processing system that uses AI to extract and map content from unstructured Word documents to structured formats. The system preserves document formatting, headings, and layout while transforming the content according to predefined templates.

projects.title: Modular Site-Based Management System
projects.description: Developed backend APIs for a complex modular system where users log in, select sites and modules, and manage dependent data (haMaterial, haSchedule, etc.) using linked dropdowns and relational logic.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive management system with role-based access control. Users can select multiple sites and modules, with data dependencies managed through cascading dropdowns and complex relational queries. Implemented secure authentication and authorization.

projects.title: Full Stack Deployment Architecture
projects.description: Deployed React frontend on Firebase Hosting and Node.js + Python backends on AWS EC2 with NGINX reverse proxy, SSL, custom domains, and systemd services without PM2.
projects.longDescription: A production-ready deployment setup with multiple services. Configured NGINX as reverse proxy, set up SSL certificates, configured custom domains, and created systemd services for automatic startup and management.

projects.title: Authentication System Deep Dive
projects.description: Implemented complete authentication and authorization flows including JWT, cookies, sessions, role-based middleware, and secure API access across multi-user environments.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive authentication system supporting multiple authentication methods. Implemented JWT tokens, HTTP-only cookies, server-side sessions, and role-based access control with middleware validation.
